summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of ResCue research management dashboard. All major features tested successfully including dashboard metrics, navigation, filtering, study detail pages, edit modals with audit trail, and data persistence.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay intercepts pointer events causing timeout on Add button click

passed_tests: Dashboard page loads with 4 metric cards (Active Studies: 2, Completed Studies: 1, Pending Tasks: 10, Publications: 4)
All metric cards are clickable and navigate to respective pages
All Studies page with search filter and status dropdown filter working
Status badges showing correct counts for all statuses (Active, Completed, Pending, On Hold)
Grants page showing table with 5 grant entries and financial summary cards
Publications page with type filter working correctly
Tasks page with priority sorting (8 Crucial tasks properly sorted) and status filters
Study Detail page with all 7 collapsible sections working
Edit modals with mandatory change reason prompt for audit trail working
History modal showing audit trail entries
JSON Export/Import buttons functional in sidebar
All 5 seed studies (Optomed, VR Rehab, PedVax, FLEX, NeuroShield) displayed correctly
Navigation between all pages working seamlessly
Search functionality working on All Studies, Publications, and Tasks pages
Grant table rows clickable and navigate to study detail pages
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix modal overlay issue in Edit Tags modal where the overlay intercepts pointer events. Consider adding proper z-index management or using a different modal implementation approach.
